jobRequisition.jobDescription:
Globant is one of the fastest-growing tech brand in the world, achieving $2.3B in revenue and a 29.9% compound annual growth rate.  North America is the biggest market for Globant since its beginnings.

 

Role: We seek a ServiceNow Sales Specialist who shares our passion for innovation and change. This role is critical to helping our business partners evolve and adapt to consumers' personalized expectations in this new technological era.

 

 

Salary range: $175,000 - $210,000

 

 

Location: Remote (Any location in the USA)

 

 

What will help you succeed:

  • Building and executing a proactive prospecting and partner-driven pipeline plan to generate net-new ServiceNow services opportunities (new logos and whitespace in existing accounts).
  • Lead discovery with executives and stakeholders to uncover business problems and translate them into ServiceNow-led transformation roadmaps.
  • Develop high-impact points of view by industry/function (e.g., IT, HR, customer operations, risk/security) to open doors and create demand.
  • Own the full opportunity lifecycle: qualification, solution shaping, resourcing alignment, proposal/SOW development, negotiation, and closure. This will be done together with Globant’s account teams and ServiceNow Studio Architects.
  • Maintain disciplined follow-up and accurate forecasting; manage multiple pursuits in parallel across regions/time zones.
  • Orchestrate internal teams (delivery, solution architects, SMEs, legal, finance) to create compelling client-ready narratives and commercials.
  • Maintain strong working knowledge of the ServiceNow platform and roadmap, including Now Assist and AI capabilities and how customers adopt them responsibly.
  • Communicate value and practical considerations for AI use cases (productivity, virtual agents, knowledge, workflow automation, agentic experiences) with executives and operational leaders.
  • Partner with solution architects to ensure feasibility and differentiation while keeping proposals aligned to client maturity, governance, and adoption readiness
  • 10+ years in enterprise consulting/services sales, client partnering, or alliance leadership (ServiceNow ecosystem strongly preferred).
  • Proven track record delivering a hunter/farmer model: net-new logo pursuit and expansion within existing accounts.
  • Demonstrated success closing complex services deals (multi-stakeholder, multi-workstream, enterprise procurement).
  • Strong executive presence with ability to lead C-level/VP conversations and influence decisions.
  • Solid ServiceNow platform fluency across core workflows and architecture concepts; ability to speak credibly with both business and technical stakeholders.

 

Benefits for this position will likely include the following:

  • Unlimited paid time off
  • Healthcare benefits
  • Dental benefits
  • Vision benefits
  • Disability insurance
  • Life insurance benefits
  • Retirement benefits, including 401(k) and a potential company match.
  • Parental leave for both birthing (up to 14 weeks of paid leave) and non-birthing parents (up to 4 weeks paid leave), as well as adoption leave (up to 8 weeks of paid leave), subject to qualifications
  • Child hospitalization leave (up to 15 paid calendar days per year), subject to qualifications
  • “Be kind to yourself day” on your anniversary (subject to terms and conditions)
  • Graduation and birthing gifts, subject to eligibility
  • Paid Jury duty (up to 4 weeks a year), subject to eligibility
  • Paid moving days (up to 2 days a year), subject to eligibility
  • Approximately 12 paid company holidays a year

 

 

Accommodations:

If you require accommodation, please contact the recruiting team

 

Applicant Privacy:

Globant will collect and process your information as part of this application. For more information, review Globant’s Privacy Policy.

 

Equal Employment Opportunity:

Globant is an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer. We are committed to building a workforce representative of the users we serve, fostering a culture of belonging, and providing equal employment opportunity regardless of any basis protected by law.

 

Use of AI in Recruitment:

Globant may use AI and machine‑learning technologies in the recruitment process. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. Globant is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities.

 

Remote Work:

Remote work permissibility may change based on business needs. For questions regarding work locations, speak directly with your hiring partner.

Job Title:

Senior Client Partner / Media & Entertainment (M&E)

 

 

Location:

Prefer NY/NJ or Los Angeles

 

About Globant:
Globant is a leading digital transformation company, blending innovation, technology, and creativity to empower organizations across industries. We are committed to creating tailored solutions that help our clients excel in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

 

Role Overview:
Globant is seeking an experienced Sr. Client Partner to manage some of our M&E clients.  As a Senior Client Partner, you will play a critical role in driving sales growth, managing client relationships, and delivering exceptional customer satisfaction. This position requires a strategic thinker with excellent communication skills, a proven sales track record, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

 

Key Responsibilities:

 

  • Client Relationship Management:
    • Develop and implement strategies to maximize sales opportunities and manage all aspects of client relations.
    • Strategically advance customer relations to ensure high levels of satisfaction and retention, while identifying up-selling opportunities.
  • Sales Process Management:
    • Manage the entire sales process, including lead qualification, pre-sales activities such as demos, and contract completion.
    • Develop, negotiate, and close long-term agreements with accounts in your assigned territory.
    • Create and negotiate complex quotes, RFIs/RFPs, and contracts, leading sales negotiations at the decision-making level.
  • Business Development:
    • Develop new opportunities through networking, cold calling, and other lead generation techniques.
    • Manage the sales cycle, including lead qualification, arranging and delivering presentations, and closing sales.
  • Collaboration and Delivery:
    • Globant works in teams: Business, Delivery and Technology. As such you will work closely with tech and delivery leaders as well as onsite and offshore development teams to ensure smooth delivery and high customer satisfaction.
    • Mobilize internal resources to deliver solutions on time and beyond client expectations.
    •  
  • Executive-Level Engagement:
    • Handle executive-level calls, developing solutions tailored to clients' needs.
    • Deliver compelling software demonstrations to both technical and non-technical executives.
  • Reporting and Insights:
    • Report account activity, opportunity status, and other relevant details to support organizational decision-making.
    •  

Qualifications:

  • Proven ability to develop, negotiate, and manage clients with potential revenue of $50M/year.
  • Strong understanding of RFIs/RFPs, contract creation, and strategic sales negotiation.
  • Experience in identifying and leveraging up-sell opportunities.
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a dynamic, team-oriented environment.
  • Exceptional communication, presentation, and analytical skills.
  • Comfortable presenting technical and business concepts to diverse audiences, including executives.
  •  

What We Offer:

  • A collaborative culture fostering innovation and professional growth.
  • Opportunities to work on high-impact projects with globally recognized brands.
  • Competitive compensation and benefits package.
  • Flexible work environment with opportunities to shape the future of digital transformation.
  • Pay range: $200K - $260K

 

How to Apply:
If you are a results-driven professional with a passion for delivering value through innovative solutions, we’d love to hear from you! Submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience and achievements relevant to this role.

Join Globant and help redefine what’s possible in the digital age!

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We enhance business development and enterprise solutions to prepare them for a digital future. With a diverse and talented team present in more than 30 countries, we are strategic partners to leading global companies in their business process transformation.

We are seeking a Senior AI Engineer who shares our passion for innovation and transformation. This role is critical in building advanced AI-driven solutions that enable our business partners to evolve and meet the growing demand for personalized, intelligent digital experiences.

 

You will get the chance to:

  • Design, develop, and enhance an AI-powered chatbot for a national tourism platform
  • Integrate and deploy open-source LLMs within secure private cloud environments
  • Build and maintain scalable Python backend services powering AI-driven interactions
  • Design and implement agentic workflows, including tool integration, context retrieval, database querying, and external API communication
  • Optimize model performance, latency, and scalability across GPU environments
  • Integrate AI solutions with Azure AI services and existing platform infrastructure
  • Monitor and continuously improve system performance using LLM evaluation techniques and other optimization methods

What will help you succeed:

  • Strong experience in AI engineering, particularly with Large Language Models (LLMs)
  • Hands-on experience with open-source frameworks (e.g., Hugging Face Transformers)
  • Proven experience deploying AI models on GPU infrastructure
  • Solid Python backend development experience for AI services and APIs
  • Familiarity with LLM engineering patterns such as tool calling, structured outputs, retrieval systems, and streaming responses
  • Experience building real-time chat systems using HTTP streaming (SSE or similar)
  • Experience integrating AI systems with databases, APIs, and external services to enable agentic behavior and decision-making
  • Familiarity with Azure cloud services, particularly Azure AI or related infrastructure
  • Understanding of model optimization techniques (e.g., quantization, inference performance, scaling)

Nice to have:

  • Familiarity with frontend technologies such as React or Next.js
  • Experience developing chat interfaces

Soft skills:

  • Strong problem-solving and system design mindset
  • Collaborative approach with the ability to work across teams while also delivering independently
  • Clear communication with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
  • High level of ownership and accountability
  • Focus on building reliable, production-grade AI systems

Location: Remote

 

 

Create with us digital products that people love. We will bring businesses and consumers together through AI technology and creativity, driving digital transformation to impact the world positively.


We may use AI and machine learning technologies in our recruitment process. Compensation is determined based on skills, qualifications, experience, and location. In addition to competitive salaries, we offer a comprehensive benefits package. Learn more about our commitment to diversity and inclusion and Globant’s Benefits.

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We enhance business development and enterprise solutions to prepare them for a digital future. With a diverse and talented team present in more than 30 countries, we are strategic partners to leading global companies in their business process transformation.

We seek Creative Copywriters (Vietnamese candidates only) who shares our passion for innovation and change. This role is critical to helping our business partners evolve and adapt to consumers' personalized expectations in this new technological era.

 

Hanoi/Danang - Hybrid Working, Ho Chi Minh - Remote Full-time

 

You will get the chance to:

  • Develop original concepts and creative platforms for campaigns and brand work

  • Write across a wide range of formats:

      • Campaigns (film, print, digital)

      • Websites (full structure, UX flows, microcopy, landing pages)

      • Long-form content (manifestos, brand narratives, editorial pieces)

      • Social and content ecosystems

  • Translate strategy into clear, structured, and effective communication systems

  • Define and maintain tone of voice across all touchpoints

  • Structure and write end-to-end website content, from architecture to final copy

  • Collaborate with designers, strategists, and developers to ensure coherence between idea, UX, and content

  • Present and defend work with clarity and authority

  • Mentor junior writers and raise overall craft standards

 

What will help you succeed:

  • 6–10+ years of experience in high-level creative environments

  • A portfolio that demonstrates both:

      • Conceptual thinking (campaigns, ideas)

      • Executional depth (web, long-form, systems)

  • Exceptional writing skills: clear, structured, precise

  • Proven experience writing full websites (not just headlines)

  • Strong understanding of UX writing, content hierarchy, and user flows

  • Ability to move from big idea to detailed execution without losing quality

  • Strong editorial judgement and attention to detail

  • Experience working on international brands or multi-market projects

  • Good at English skills

Hanoi/Danang - Hybrid Working, Ho Chi Minh - Remote Full-time

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We enhance business development and enterprise solutions to prepare them for a digital future. We seek UI/UX Designers (Vietnamese candidates only) who shares our passion for innovation and change. This role is critical to helping our business partners evolve and adapt to consumers' personalized expectations in this new technological era.

 

Hanoi/Danang - Hybrid Working, Ho Chi Minh - Remote Full-time

 

You will get the chance to:

  • Own and lead complex, ambiguous projects end-to-end with a high level of autonomy.

  • Act as the primary design and technical reference within the team.

  • Anticipate risks and proactively manage scope, timelines, and stakeholder expectations.

  • Lead strategic conversations, defending solutions with data, business KPIs, and product vision.

  • Conduct QA and design audits in real environments (pre-production and production) to ensure design fidelity and quality.

  • Ensure consistency across products by contributing to and evolving design systems.

  • Leverage AI tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex, ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.) to co-create solutions alongside engineering teams.

  • Build and deploy AI-powered workflows or agents to improve team efficiency and reduce operational friction.

  • Use AI to enhance design processes, including automation, rapid prototyping, and predictive insights.

  • Explore and implement new ways of integrating AI into product experiences.

  • Foster a critical mindset and keep the team aligned with industry trends and emerging technologies.

 

What will help you succeed:

  • 5+ years of experience in UX/UI or Product Design roles.

  • Proven experience leading complex digital products from concept to launch.

  • Strong portfolio demonstrating both strategic thinking and high-quality execution.

  • Deep understanding of UX principles, interaction design, and visual design.

  • Strong product thinking and business orientation.

  • Ability to work in fast-paced, ambiguous environments.

  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

  • Experience working closely with engineering teams (Agile environments).

  • Familiarity with design systems and scalable design practices.

  • Good at English skills

Hanoi/Danang - Hybrid Working, Ho Chi Minh - Remote Full-time

Globant is one of the fastest-growing tech brand in the world, achieving $2.3B in revenue and a
29.9% compound annual growth rate. North America is the biggest market for Globant since its
beginnings and the Consumer Products & Retail sector is one of the top industries across the
US and Canada.
As we continue this incredible journey, now is the perfect time to join our team in North America,
where amazing opportunities lie ahead. As a Microsoft Partner, we help our clients leverage the
Globant Studios to drive growth and innovation in the Consumer Products & Retail sectors.
Our mission is to serve businesses across the region, enabling them to reach new heights
through robust Microsoft strategies and solutions


Key Responsibilities:


Solution Ownership & Delivery:
● Engage with Consumer Products and Retail AI industry leaders as well as AI and Globant top
accounts for co-sell motions.
● Make good use of AI funding programs and Marketing co-funds to impact AI
Globant business.
● Led the AI Studio go-to-market strategy in Consumer Products & Retail for North
America.
● Act as the lead solution owner for our AI offerings, managing projects across the AI
● Engage directly with clients to understand their needs, offering customized AI
solutions that drive impactful outcomes.


Customer-Focused Business Development:
● Serve as a trusted advisor for clients during pre-sales and sales stages, positioning our
AI capabilities in the Consumer Products & Retail space as integral to their business
growth.
● Lead efforts in identifying and cultivating farm opportunities to deepen client
relationships.
● Partner with sales teams to develop tailored solutions that align with client objectives and
industry demands.
Portfolio Growth & Go-To-Market Strategy:
● Contribute to the go-to-market strategies to drive the growth within
North America in Consumer Products & Retail Services industry.
● Collaborate with the VP of Tech, Managing Director, VP of Delivery for the portfolio, and
the SVP of Globant Europe Enterprise Business Network to coordinate sales
strategies.
● Bring innovative ideas and solutions to enhance our offerings, ensuring our
services meet evolving market needs.


Team Collaboration & Leadership:
● Lead by example, fostering a collaborative environment within the CPG-Retail Studio and
mentoring team members across AI projects.
● Work as part of the VP of Tech team, contributing to strategic initiatives and aligning with
broader organizational goals.
● Promote cross-functional collaboration, leveraging insights from other Globant Studios,
such as AI Consumer Products & Retail, Process Optimization and Cloud Studios, to
enhance project outcomes and impact Globant client’s business.

Qualifications:
● Extensive experience in AI solutions.
● Proven success in presales, sales, and solution delivery, with a customer-centric
approach.
● Strong leadership and collaborative skills with experience in managing teams, staffing for
projects, and motivating colleagues.
● Ability to work with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to achieve business
objectives.
● Skilled in developing and executing growth strategies within the AI ecosystem, with a
strong understanding of the Spanish market.


Benefits for this position will likely include the following:
● Unlimited paid time off
● Healthcare benefits
● Dental benefits
● Vision benefits
● Disability insurance
● Life insurance benefits
● Retirement benefits, including 401(k) and a potential company match.
● Parental leave for both birthing (up to 14 weeks of paid leave) and non-birthing
parents (up to 4 weeks paid leave), as well as adoption leave (up to 8 weeks of paid
leave), subject to qualifications
● Child hospitalization leave (up to 15 paid calendar days per year), subject to
qualifications
● “Be kind to yourself day” on your anniversary (subject to terms and conditions)
● Graduation and birthing gifts, subject to eligibility
● Paid Jury duty (up to 4 weeks a year), subject to eligibility
● Paid moving days (up to 2 days a year), subject to eligibility
● Approximately 12 paid company holidays a year

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We enhance business development and enterprise solutions to prepare them for a digital future. With a diverse and talented team present in more than 30 countries, we are strategic partners to leading global companies in their business process transformation.

 

We seek an Oracle Development Tech Manager / Subject Matter Expert who shares our passion for innovation and change. This role is critical to leading a global initiative focused on Agentic Application Modernization and Replatforming, helping our business partners evolve their legacy applications and previous Oracle DB releases into the latest Oracle PaaS, OCI, and modern Software Development Architectures.

 

What will help you succeed:

 

  • Expertise in Oracle Core & Cloud Architecture: Extensive background as a Technical Architect or DBA, with deep knowledge of OCI, Exadata CS, Autonomous Database, and latest releases (23ai/26ai).

  • Legacy Modernization & Replatforming: Proven experience transforming legacy environments (Oracle Forms, Reports, PL-SQL, Java, .Net) into modern frameworks like APEX or VB, using GoldenGate and ODI.

  • GenAI & Agentic SDLC Frameworks: Solid understanding of Generative AI Agentic models to refine automation processes, tune AI outcomes, and manage human-in-the-loop AI Pod models.

  • Technical Leadership & Mentorship: Ability to lead technical teams, guide career paths, and foster a culture of knowledge sharing aligned with AI best practices.

  • Global Presales & Solution Design: Active participation in global proposals, demos, and Proof of Concepts (PoCs), translating business needs into high-quality technical architectures.

  • Cloud, Integration & DevOps Foundations: Comprehensive grasp of CloudOps, CI/CD pipelines, IaC (Terraform), API protocols (REST/SOAP, JSON/XML), and multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP).

  • Continuous Learning & Toolkit: Familiarity with Oracle Integration Cloud (OIC), Java, Python, or JavaScript, backed by active and relevant Oracle Cloud or AI certifications.

  • Excellent communication, multitasking, and interpersonal skills to collaborate effectively with diverse technical departments in a fast-paced environment.

  • Advanced or fluent proficiency in both English and Spanish

 

This job can be filled in Spain  #LI-Hybrid

Position- Cloud Engineer (GCP Platform Engineering Lead)

Location:  Jersey City  NJ or Delaware

About Globant:
Globant is a leading digital transformation company, blending innovation, technology, and creativity to empower organizations across industries. We are committed to creating tailored solutions that help our clients excel in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

About the role

We are seeking a qualified GCP Platform Engineering Lead to support our client in New Jersey. This role will be involved in  building and running the internal platform capabilities (automation, golden paths, guardrails) that enable secure, scalable application onboarding on GCP.

 

Minimum qualifications

 

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related discipline (MS preferred).

  • 7+ Years of total experience within related skills and technologies.

Job responsibilities 

  •  Lead platform engineering delivery for onboarding automation (Terraform modules, pipelines, validations).

  • Define engineering standards (module quality, state strategy, PR controls, drift management).

  • Embed security-by-default guardrails and partner on compliance evidence automation.

  •  Operate the platform: reliability, incident response, SLOs/SLAs, continuous improvement.

Required qualifications

  •  Deep hands-on GCP + Terraform at scale; strong Python automation experience.

  •  Experience leading platform teams and operating production-grade internal platforms.

  •  Strong security and governance mindset in regulated environments.

Success measures- High adoption of golden paths; reduced onboarding lead time; stable platform with low operational toil.

What We Offer:

  • A collaborative culture fostering innovation and professional growth.

  • Opportunities to work on high-impact projects with globally recognized brands.

  • Competitive compensation and benefits package.

  • Flexible work environment with opportunities to shape the future of digital transformation.

Compensation:  The anticipated base pay range for this position is $100,000 to $150,000 per year depending on experience, skills, location, and internal equity.  

Benefits:  Benefits for this position will likely include the following:

  • Unlimited paid time off. 

  • Healthcare benefits. 

  • Dental benefits. 

  • Vision benefits. 

  • Disability insurance.

  • Life insurance benefits. 

  • Retirement benefits, including 401(k) and a potential company match. 

  • Parental leave for both birthing (up to 14 weeks of paid leave) and non-birthing parents (up to 4 weeks paid leave), as well as adoption leave (up to 8 weeks of paid leave), subject to qualifications. 

  • Child hospitalization leave (up to 15 paid calendar days per year), subject to qualifications.  

  • “Be kind to yourself day” on your anniversary (subject to terms and conditions). 

  • Graduation and birthing gifts, subject to eligibility. 

  • Paid Jury duty (up to 4 weeks a year), subject to eligibility.

  • Paid moving days (up to 2 days a year), subject to eligibility. 

  • Approximately 12 paid company holidays a year. 

For additional information regarding Globant, please see the Globant Experience Guide. 

Accommodations: If you have a need that requires an accommodation, please let us know by contacting the recruiting team.

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We help businesses transform digitally by building innovative enterprise solutions powered by modern technologies, AI, and creativity. With teams across 30+ countries, we partner with leading global organizations to accelerate their digital transformation journey.

We are looking for a passionate and skilled Senior .NET Full Stack Engineers to join our growing team in Pune/ Hyderabad/Indore and Bengalure.

Job Title: Senior .NET Full Stack Engineer

Location: Pune/Hyd/Bengaluru or Indore

Experience Required: 6+ Years

Job Overview

We are seeking a highly motivated Senior .NET Full Stack Engineer with strong expertise in backend and frontend technologies to design, develop, and maintain scalable enterprise applications. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience with .NET Core, React.js, Azure cloud services, and CI/CD pipelines.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, test, and maintain scalable web applications
  • Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices using .NET Core
  • Develop responsive frontend applications using React.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including QA, DevOps, Product Owners, and Architects
  • Participate in system integration and performance optimization
  • Work with Azure cloud services for deployment and application management
  • Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines
  • Ensure code quality through best practices, code reviews, and testing
  • Troubleshoot and resolve production and application issues
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and development activities

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • 6+ years of experience in software development
  • Strong hands-on experience with:
    • .NET Core / ASP.NET Core
    • C#
    • Exp in React.js is must (3+ Yrs)
    • JavaScript / TypeScript
    • REST APIs & Microservices
    • Microsoft Azure
    • CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, etc.)
  • Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
  • Experience working in Agile environments
  • Knowledge of SQL databases
  • Strong problem-solving and communication skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Docker/Kubernetes
  • Exposure to AI tools in development workflows
  • Experience working on enterprise or large-scale digital transformation projects
  • Knowledge of Sitecore or CMS platforms
  • Previous experience in Middle East projects is a plus

Create with us digital products that people love. We bring businesses and consumers together through AI technology and innovation, driving meaningful digital transformation worldwide.

At Globant, we believe in fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone feels valued and respected. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to creating a thriving environment for all employees and candidates.

At Globant, we are working to make the world a better place, one step at a time. We enhance business development and enterprise solutions to prepare them for a digital future. With a diverse and talented team present in more than 30 countries, we are strategic partners to leading global companies in their business process transformation.

The Cultural Hacking - Studio Partner will be the visionary executive leader responsible for driving the strategy, business growth, methodological evolution, and AI-powered transformation capabilities of the cultural transformation practice on a global scale.

This role requires a strong Disruptive Thinking and AI Mindset, constantly challenging conventional models of leadership, collaboration, talent, and organizational design by leveraging AI, automation, data-driven insights, and human-centered innovation to redefine how organizations evolve and operate.

The ultimate mission is to position Globant as the definitive strategic partner for organizational evolution, transforming traditional corporate cultures into agile, disruptive, AI-enabled, and future-ready ecosystems. As the head of the Studio, this leader acts as a Trusted Advisor to Boards and C-level executives, translating the complexities of human behavior, organizational dynamics, and emerging technologies into measurable, high-impact business levers.

 

What will help you succeed:

 

A successful Studio Partner in Cultural Hacking stands out for:

C-Suite Credibility

  • A natural ability to act as a trusted advisor to CEOs, CHROs, and Boards, clearly articulating the ROI of cultural transformation, AI adoption, organizational adaptability, and workforce evolution.

Commercial Acumen & Deal Closing
